text:
Orders

IT IS ORDERED (BY CONSENT):

Lump sum order

The [respondent] / [applicant] shall pay to the [applicant] / [respondent] for the benefit of the child[ren] of the family a lump sum of £[amount] by [time and date] / [[time] on the date [number] days after the date of this order] [to meet the [applicant’s] / [respondent’s] [removal costs] / [costs of furnishing the child[ren] of the family’s new home] / [costs of redecorating the child[ren] of the family’s new home] / [costs of purchasing a new car] / [etc]].

(either, if the lump sum is more than £5,000) If the [respondent] / [applicant] fails to pay all or any part of this lump sum [by [date for payment]] / [within [number] days of [date for payment]] simple interest shall accrue on the remaining balance of the lump sum at [the rate applicable for the time being to a High Court judgment debt] / [the rate of [percentage]% per annum].

(or, if the lump sum is less than £5,000) If the [respondent] / [applicant] fails to pay all or any part of this lump sum [by [date for payment]] / [within [number] days of [date for payment]], the [respondent] / [applicant] shall pay to the [applicant] / [respondent] a further lump sum calculated as follows: £[amount] per day from [date after date for payment] until the lump sum payment referred to at paragraph [para number of a.] above is paid in full.

Series of lump sum orders

The [respondent] / [applicant] shall pay to the [respondent] / [applicant] for the benefit of the child[ren] of the family a series of lump sums:

£[amount] by [time and date] / [[time] on the date [number] days after the date of this order];

£[amount] by [time and date] / [[time] on the date [number] days after the date of this order]; and

£[amount] by [time and date] / [[time] on the date [number] days after the date of this order].
